templates.title: Blind Date
templates.template: ❤️ Love is in the air! Each player must choose a 'partner' for this turn. If one drinks, the other does too.

templates.title: Unbridled Passion
templates.template: 🔥 It's getting hot in here! All sips involving physical contact or 'spicy' challenges are worth double (x2).
templates.endTemplate: Passion has cooled down a bit. Normal sips again.

templates.title: Sweet Words
templates.template: 🍭 You must call everyone by a pet name (Darling, Love, Honey...). Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: You can stop being so mushy now.

templates.title: Cupid's Arrow
templates.template: 🏹 The host is Cupid. They can 'aim' at two people: every time one of them drinks, the other must give them a compliment or drink {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.
templates.endTemplate: Cupid has run out of arrows.

templates.title: No Heartbreak Allowed
templates.template: 🚫 Forbidden to speak about exes or sad stories. Whoever does drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips for killing the mood.

templates.title: Romantic Dinner
templates.template: 🕯️ Sips for people sitting down are half, sips for people standing up are triple.

templates.title: Lovers' Gaze
templates.template: 😍 You cannot speak without staring directly into the other person's eyes. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: No need for such intensity anymore.

templates.title: Poet in Love
templates.template: 📜 Before drinking, you must recite a short love verse (or make one up). If it doesn't rhyme, drink {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.

templates.title: Kiss or Drink
templates.template: 💋 If the game tells you to drink, you can avoid it by giving someone a kiss (on the cheek counts). If no one accepts, drink double.

templates.title: Red Roses
templates.template: 🌹 Those wearing red clothing drink 1 less each time; those who aren't, drink 1 more.
templates.endTemplate: The color red is no longer special.

templates.title: Amorous Sincerity
templates.template: 💬 All questions during this event must be answered with total honesty. Lying = {PUNISHMENT} punishment sips.
templates.endTemplate: You can go back to faking it now.

templates.title: Domestic Partnership
templates.template: 👫 Choose a partner. During this event, whatever one drinks, the other drinks too out of solidarity.
templates.endTemplate: The couple has split up (no drama).

templates.title: Seducer's Voice
templates.template: 🎙️ You must speak with your sexiest, most whispering voice. Speaking normally = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Broken Heart
templates.template: 💔 Drama! The player who has distributed the most so far drinks alone and double the normal amount.

templates.title: Intertwined Hands
templates.template: 🤝 You must drink while holding the hand of the person next to you. If you let go, drink {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Our Date Song
templates.template: 🎼 Before drinking, you must name a romantic song. If you repeat one, drink {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.

templates.title: No Dirty Talk
templates.template: 😇 Ladies and gents night. No insulting or using crude words. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Lovers' Day
templates.template: 💘 Double or nothing! Sips given to real couples are worth x0. Sips given to singles are worth x3.

templates.title: Whisper in the Ear
templates.template: 👂 You can only speak by whispering in the ear of the closest person. Anyone who speaks out loud drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: You can speak out loud again.

templates.title: The Third Wheel
templates.template: 👤 Choose a person who cannot speak or participate. If someone speaks to them, both drink {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Santa's Caresses
templates.template: 🍑 You can only drink if someone is giving you a shoulder massage. If there's no massage, drink {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.

templates.title: Group Crush
templates.template: 💘 Everyone's in love! When one person drinks, everyone else must drink 1 sip out of amorous solidarity.

templates.title: Pinky Promise
templates.template: 🤙 You must drink with your pinky raised and hooked onto someone else's. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Secret Admirer
templates.template: 💌 Write someone's name on an imaginary paper. Every time that person drinks, you drink double for secret love.

templates.title: Erogenous Zones
templates.template: 🔞 Touching your face, neck, or arms is forbidden. If they itch or you touch them, drink {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: You can touch whatever you want again.

templates.title: Toast to Love
templates.template: 🍷 Before each round of drinks, everyone must say 'Long live love!'. Whoever forgets drinks {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.

templates.title: Ex's Revenge
templates.template: 👿 Revenge! The person who most recently ended a relationship drinks triple of everything.

templates.title: For Couples Only
templates.template: 👨‍❤️‍👨 Only those who form a couple (in-game or real) can speak. Singles can only drink and nod. Speaking = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Valentine's Gift
templates.template: 🎁 Every time it's your turn to drink, you can choose someone to drink for you, but you must give them something of yours (an object, a piece of clothing...) until the end of the event.

templates.title: Express Wedding
templates.template: 💍 Two players must 'get married' (join their glasses). While married, they always drink together and double.
